EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IUtilityNetworkQuery

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that query the elements of the utility network.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("7342C13E-0F9B-44D6-A210-1EEC7295B4CD")]
public interface IUtilityNetworkQuery

Properties

AttributeByName[string]

Returns the network attribute with the given name.

IUtilityNetworkAttribute AttributeByName[string Name] { get; }

Parameters

Name string

Property Value

IUtilityNetworkAttribute

Examples

Sample Snippet

AttributeValueByName[esriElementType, long, string]

Returns the value of this network element for the given network attribute name.

object AttributeValueByName[esriElementType ElementType, long EID, string AttributeName] { get; }

Parameters

ElementType esriElementType
EID long
AttributeName string

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

AttributeValueByUsageType[esriElementType, long, esriUtilityNetworkAttributeUsageType]

Returns the value of this network element for the given network attribute usage type.

object AttributeValueByUsageType[esriElementType ElementType, long EID, esriUtilityNetworkAttributeUsageType UsageType] { get; }

Parameters

ElementType esriElementType
EID long
UsageType esriUtilityNetworkAttributeUsageType

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

Geometry[esriElementType, long]

Returns the geometry in the utility network corresponding to the given element ID.

IGeometry Geometry[esriElementType ElementType, long EID] { get; }

Parameters

ElementType esriElementType
EID long

Property Value

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

HasDirtyElement[long[], long[]]

Returns whether any of the given set of junction and edge elements correspond to a feature in the dirty area table.

bool HasDirtyElement[long[] junctionEIDs, long[] edgeEIDs] { get; }

Parameters

junctionEIDs long[]
edgeEIDs long[]

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsSpatial[int]

Returns whether the network source corresponding to the given network source ID is spatial.

bool IsSpatial[int NetworkSourceID] { get; }

Parameters

NetworkSourceID int

Property Value

bool

Sample Snippet

AllEIDs(out long[], out int[])

Returns all network index EIDs.

void AllEIDs(out long[] EIDs, out int[] ElementTypes)

Parameters

EIDs long[]
ElementTypes int[]

junctionEIDs ILongLongArray

GlobalID Guid

Returns the elements in the utility network corresponding to the given source objects.

EIDs object
ElementTypes object

QueryAdjacentEdgesJunctions(long, out object, out object)

Performs a network edge element query by element ID and edge direction and populates the given edge element object.

void QueryAdjacentEdgesJunctions(long junctionEID, out object adjacentEdges, out object adjacentJunctions)

Parameters

junctionEID long
adjacentEdges object
adjacentJunctions object

Examples

Sample Snippet

QueryAdjacentEdgesJunctionsWithWeights(long, bool, out object, out object, out ILongLongArray, out IVariantArray, out esriJunctionConnectivityStatus, out IArray, out IArray) 

void QueryAdjacentEdgesJunctionsWithWeights(long junctionEID, bool traversabilityBased, out object adjacentEdges, out object adjacentJunctions, out ILongLongArray currentJunctionWeightIDs, out IVariantArray currentJunctionWeightValues, out esriJunctionConnectivityStatus junctionConnectivityStatus, out IArray edgeWeightIDs, out IArray edgeWeightValues)

Parameters

junctionEID long
traversabilityBased bool
adjacentEdges object
adjacentJunctions object
currentJunctionWeightIDs ILongLongArray
currentJunctionWeightValues IVariantArray
junctionConnectivityStatus esriJunctionConnectivityStatus
edgeWeightIDs IArray
edgeWeightValues IArray

QueryFromToJunctions(long, out long, out long)

Queries the two end junction element IDs by edge element ID.

void QueryFromToJunctions(long edgeEID, out long FromJunctionEID, out long ToJunctionEID)

edgeEID long
FromJunctionEID long
ToJunctionEID long
